subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth unto him who hath turned towards God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, and hath quaffed the choice sealed wine when it appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق لمن اقبل الی الله المهیمن القیوم و شرب الرحیق المختوم اذ اتی
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @Word of God and human limitations, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @presence of; reunion with God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
